overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting a transition from the Herbology greenhouse interior through a corridor to an outdoor courtyard. The clip begins with a first-person view of the plant-filled greenhouse, then switches to third-person perspective following a Hufflepuff student ascending stairs and exiting to a sunlit walled garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: herbology greenhouse with rows of planting tables

events.description: student in dark robes walks through the greenhouse from left to right, passing the planting tables

agents.ego_description: standing in the greenhouse observing the herbology equipment and plants, occasionally panning the view

notable_agents.action: student walking across the greenhouse floor from left to right

entered.detail: curved iron and glass roof structure with green metal framework enclosing the space
long wooden tables with soil beds and growing plants arranged in rows
trailing green vines hanging from the ceiling structure
various potted magical plants with broad leaves and colorful flowers
cobblestone floor tiles with drainage channels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a large greenhouse conservatory with a curved glass and iron roof. Wooden planting tables fill the central area with various magical herbs and plants. A student in dark robes walks across the stone floor from left to right, while the camera remains mostly stationary, panning slightly to observe the herbology environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior staircase and corridor with ornate railings

events.description: camera perspective switches to third-person following a student in Hufflepuff robes ascending the wooden staircase
character reaches the top of the stairs and proceeds through the corridor toward the arched exit doorway

agents.ego_description: Hufflepuff student climbing the ornate wooden staircase and walking through the interior corridor toward the exit

entered.detail: wide wooden stairs with decorative carved railings and green painted posts
intricate black iron railings with scrollwork patterns lining the stairs
narrow passage with stone walls and large glass panel windows
tall arched door with glass panels leading to the outside courtyard

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a student in robes with yellow trim. The character ascends an ornate wooden staircase with wrought iron railings, then proceeds through a narrow stone corridor with glass windows. The environment transitions from the plant-filled greenhouse to a more enclosed interior space as the character approaches an arched exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled courtyard garden with central pathway

events.description: character exits the building into a sunlit stone courtyard with a large blossoming tree

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone courtyard toward the large green door at the far end, passing other students resting on benches

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a stone bench conversing near the wall

entered.detail: irregular stone paving tiles forming a pathway through the garden
large tree with pink and purple blossoms overhanging the courtyard
tall green metal fence with vertical bars enclosing the courtyard perimeter
massive circular green metal door with decorative patterns at the courtyard end
stone seating along the wall where students are resting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright sunlit courtyard enclosed by high green metal fences. A large tree with pink blossoms stands to the left, while the path leads toward an ornate green door at the far end. Two students sit conversing on a stone bench to the right. The camera follows the character as they walk across the cobblestone pavement toward the central door, completing the transition from indoor greenhouse to outdoor garden space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from the lush, enclosed interior of a magical conservatory into a bright, open-air courtyard. It begins inside a large greenhouse with a curved glass and iron roof, panning across wooden planting tables filled with various herbs as a student walks across the stone floor. As the perspective shifts to follow a student in yellow-trimmed robes, the camera ascends an ornate wooden staircase and moves through a narrow stone corridor, transitioning from the botanical environment into a more enclosed interior space. The scene then opens as the character emerges through an arched doorway into a sunlit courtyard enclosed by high green metal fences. Finally, the camera follows the character across cobblestone pavement, passing a blossoming pink tree and students on a stone bench, toward an ornate green door at the far end of the garden.
